ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the tweet */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the tweet's author */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the tweet */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the tweet (ranging from -1 to 1) */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets the tweet has received */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the tweet has received */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies the tweet has received */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tweet */,
  "geo_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the tweet */,
  "tweet_type" TEXT /* Type of tweet (e.g., original, retweet, reply) */,
  "quoted_status_id" TEXT /* ID of the quoted status (if any) */,
  "in_reply_to_status_id" TEXT /* ID of the status being replied to (if any) */,
  "in_reply_to_user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user being replied to (if any) */,
  "possibly_sensitive" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the tweet is possibly sensitive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_username FOREIGN KEY ("username") REFERENCES users ("username")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Bio or description of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "banner_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's banner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag" TEXT /* Text of the hashtag */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the hashtag (based on usage frequency and engagement) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the hashtag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_hashtags" (
  "tweet_hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet-hashtag association */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_hashtags_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_hashtags_hashtag_id FOREIGN KEY ("hashtag_id") REFERENCES hashtags ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "mentioned_user_id" TEXT /* ID of the mentioned user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_mentioned_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("mentioned_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retweets" (
  "retweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retweet */,
  "original_tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the original tweet */,
  "retweeted_by_user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who retweeted */,
  "retweet_datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the retweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_original_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("original_tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_retweeted_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("retweeted_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "liked_by_user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who liked */,
  "like_datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the like */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_liked_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("liked_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet being replied to */,
  "replied_by_user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who replied */,
  "reply_text" TEXT /* Text content of the reply */,
  "reply_datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reply */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_replied_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("replied_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_url" TEXT /* URL for more information about the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., conference, meetup, webinar) */,
  "event_category" TEXT /* Category of the event (e.g., cryptocurrency, blockchain, fintech) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_tweets" (
  "event_tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event-tweet association */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_tweets_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_tweets_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user engaging with the tweet */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet being engaged with */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., retweet, like, reply) */,
  "engagement_datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis result */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the tweet (ranging from -1 to 1) */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Sentiment label (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "analysis_datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the sentiment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follower relationship */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "follower_user_id" TEXT /* ID of the follower user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_followers_follower_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("follower_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_following" (
  "following_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each following relationship */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who is following */,
  "following_user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user being followed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("following_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_following_following_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("following_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_following_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
